# humanize-text
Description: Two-pass AI text humanizer — GPT-5.4-mini analysis + model rewrite via VoidAI. Removes AI-sounding patterns and rewrites text to sound naturally human.
Source: project
Triggers: humanize, de-AI, make this sound human, remove AI patterns, ai detection, rewrite naturally, sound human
Tools: run_skill_script
Scripts: humanize.py
# humanize-text

Use this skill whenever you need to make AI-generated text sound naturally human-written.

## When to invoke
- User asks to "humanize", "de-AI", or "make this sound more human"
- Text sounds robotic, repetitive, or AI-patterned
- Academic writing needs to pass AI detection
- Any output you've generated that needs to read as natural human prose

## Two-Pass Pipeline

**Pass 1 — Analysis (gpt-5.4-mini)**
Flags: AI phrases, tone mismatches, repetitive structures, key points to preserve.

**Pass 2 — Rewrite (user-selected model, default: claude-sonnet-4-6)**
Rewrites using the analysis as a guide, targeting the chosen tone and creativity level.

## Usage

Run `humanize.py` via `run_skill_script`:

```
skill_name: humanize-text
script: humanize.py
args: ["<text>"]
secrets: ["SHARED_VOIDAI_BG_KEY"]
```

### Optional flags
| Flag | Values | Default |
|------|--------|---------|
| `--tone` | `neutral`, `casual`, `professional` | `neutral` |
| `--creativity` | `low`, `medium`, `high` | `low` |
| `--model` | any VoidAI model id | `claude-sonnet-4-6` |

### Available rewrite models
- `claude-sonnet-4-6` ✦ Recommended
- `claude-opus-4-6` — Premium quality
- `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` — Fast & light
- `gpt-5.5` — Structured polish
- `gpt-5.4-mini` — Fast & efficient
- `gemini-2.5-pro`
- `gemini-2.5-flash`
- `deepseek-v3.1`
- `mistral-large-latest`

## Secrets required
Pass `SHARED_VOIDAI_BG_KEY` in the `secrets` array when calling `run_skill_script`.

## Output
Returns the humanized text to stdout. Progress logs go to stderr. Errors exit non-zero.
